metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.7-beta.9
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Improves Heritage-mode selection with a deeper teal fill and white text. - Gives selected rows priority over played-state yellow text. - Rebuilds Help as a clean, scrollable, fully localized quick reference. - Groups shortcuts by workspace, results, preview, organization, and Transfer. - Replaces the README workspace and Focus-mode preview images.
